scripts.setup:run: cd data-provisioning-tool && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && cd ../db-testing-framework && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && npx playwright install && cd ..
scripts.test:full: cd data-provisioning-tool && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings' npx ts-node src/init-db.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='--loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings' npx ts-node src/seeder.ts && cd ../db-testing-framework && npx playwright test
